## Description

## Type of Change

- [ ] 🐛 Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] ✨ New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] 💥 Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected)
- [ ] 📖 Documentation update
- [ ] ⚙️ Configuration change
- [ ] 🔧 Refactoring (no functional changes, no bug fixes)

## Testing

<!-- How has this been tested? -->

- [ ] Unit tests added/updated
- [ ] Integration tests added/updated
- [ ] Manual testing performed
- [ ] Tests pass successfully

## Dependencies

<!-- What dependencies need to be updated? -->

- [ ] No new dependencies
- [ ] Python dependencies added to `requirements.txt`
- [ ] Helm chart values updated
- [ ] Terraform variables updated

- [ ] Code follows repository style and conventions
- [ ] Documentation has been updated
- [ ] Tests have been added (if applicable)
- [ ] CHANGELOG.md updated (if applicable)
- [ ] PR title follows Conventional Commits
